name: Chicken in a Pot
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds chicken, whole or cut up
or 1 cup water with 2 bullion cubes (chicken flavor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place carrots, onions, and celery in the crock pot.
2. Add chicken on top of the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle salt, pepper, basil, sage, and thyme over the chicken.
4. Pour the liquid (chicken broth or water with bullion cubes) over the chicken.
5. Cover the pot and cook on low for 7-8 hours, or high for 2 1/2 - 3 1/2 hours.
6. Serve over rice.
